prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood, warm forge light. Yuna Ironleaf, a feminine ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf brooch, steadies a shield on the workbench. Yuna Dawncrest 045, a masculine mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags, uses a repair tool on the shield. Cooperative hands, safe interaction, no sparks, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and characters. Yuna Dawncrest 045 taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Ironleaf holds it steady. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
